query:
WITH response_count AS (
                SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
                FROM responses
                WHERE thread_id = ?
            ) UPDATE threads
            SET response_count = (SELECT cnt FROM response_count),
                last_modified_at = GREATEST(last_modified_at, ?),
                active = CASE
                    WHEN archived = 1 THEN 0
                    ELSE (SELECT cnt FROM response_count) <= 1000
                END
            WHERE id = ?;
